            name_last,
            email,
            corporate_name,
            department_name,
            position_name,
            postal_code,
            state,
            city,
            address1,
            address2,
            phone_number
        )
        values (
        ?,
        ?,
        ?,
        ?,
        ?,
        ?,
        ?,
        ?,
        ?,
        ?,
        ?,
        ?,
        ?
        )
